markdown:
1. Hop 1 establishes that GPT-3 directly extends GPT-2's architecture: the GPT-3 paper states it uses the same model and architecture as GPT-2, including the modified initialization, pre-normalization, and reversible tokenization, with the only exception being alternating dense and locally banded sparse attention patterns. [1]
2. Hop 2 establishes that GPT-2 cites "Attention Is All You Need" as the source of its Transformer architecture: the GPT-2 paper references self-attention architectures like the Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) as providing significant improvements in the expressiveness of models computing conditional probabilities. [2]

Sources
[1] Language Models are Few-Shot Learners, 2.1 Model and Architectures, p. 8
[2] Language Models are Unsupervised Multitask Learners, 2. Approach, p. 2
summary: Hop 1 establishes that GPT-3 directly extends GPT-2's architecture: the GPT-3 paper states it uses the same model and architecture as GPT-2, including the modified initialization, pre-normalization, and reversible tokenization, with the only exception being alternating dense and locally banded spars
